message:
fix(phase0): skip outcome/fingerprint comparison for structural rewrites

Structural rewrites like DedupRaceJoin change task topology, so race
outcomes and trace fingerprints legitimately differ between original
and rewritten plans. Only assert exact equality for identity rewrites
(expected_step_count == 0).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
